description: Recto: Two fragmentary legal records or drafts, perhaps from a court notebook. The lower one refers to Abū l-Maḥāsin [...] b. Abū l-Riḍā [...] and the purchase of a shop with all its equipment and scales for a sum of 46[.]. Verso: Draft of a the beginning of a legal document. In a different hand. Dated: 1540 Seleucid = 1228/29 CE, under the authority of Avraham Maimonides. One of the parties is Shelomo ha-Kohen.
description_he: מסמך משפטי ביהודית-ערבית מהמאה ה-13. מוחזק בבית המדרש לרבנים.
